penalty_extra_disagreement.claude_breakdown: 4.0 placement only (no out-of-rubric penalties this time)
penalty_extra_disagreement.analysis: Both teachers stayed inside the rubric this time. The full 4-point penalty delta is attributable to the per-mark deviation estimate (Claude 2.0mm vs GPT-4o 1.0mm). Both estimates are explicitly low-confidence due to the off-axis monitor capture.

phase_attribution_disagreement.claude_diagnosis: Throw 3 (27s) and cutting (53s) are the loss centers; placement (18s) and throws 1+2 (40s) consolidated.
phase_attribution_disagreement.gpt4o_diagnosis: Inter-throw tail management is the loss center; reports throw 1 11.5s, throw 2 32s, throw 3 35s, cut 17s.
phase_attribution_disagreement.analysis: Score agreement is very strong but the per-phase timeline differs materially. Claude's split is grounded in frame-by-frame phase boundaries from the video record; GPT-4o's split appears to over-allocate time to throw 2 and under-allocate to the cut. Recommend treating Claude's phase split as canonical for V27 and using GPT-4o's score as the rubric-strict reconciled value.

fls_score_reconciliation.reconciliation_note: Near-exact score agreement (Δ2.0). Both teachers independently identify V27 as a fatigue regression from V26 (94s/500-tier) back into the V21–V25 plateau band, with no avulsion and a secure final knot. Rubric-strict reconciled value is 456.0 (GPT-4o).

systematic_findings.fatigue_regression_pattern_confirmed: V26→V27 (94→140) mirrors the V24→V25 pattern (117→150): a series-best run followed by a plateau regression on the next attempt within the same session. Both teachers flag this independently. Heaviest debris on the board in the entire series corroborates that this is deep into a practice block.
systematic_findings.score_agreement_continues: Two consecutive videos (V26, V27) where Claude and GPT-4o agree within 4 FLS points. Inter-teacher score reliability on this trainee is now consistently strong.
systematic_findings.placement_estimate_drift_persists: Claude continues to estimate placement deviation ~1mm higher per mark than GPT-4o on monitor-capture videos. Pattern is now visible across V20, V22, V25, V26, V27. Recommend either standardizing the estimate to the lower-confidence midpoint or adding a calibration note to the prompt.
systematic_findings.phase_split_divergence_new: V27 is the first comparison in recent memory where the per-phase timelines diverge materially while the totals agree. Worth tracking whether this recurs on future fatigued / debris-heavy attempts.
systematic_findings.drain_agreement_continues: V27 is another drain-closure agreement case. Running tally now: AGREE 7 (V12, V13, V18, V19, V22, V26, V27), DIVERGE 5 (V11, V14, V16, V17, V20).
